goal: Add partial payment tracking to RepaymentSchedule and fix payment allocation logic

tasks.name: Add amountPaid field to RepaymentSchedule entity
tasks.action: Add amountPaid BigDecimal field with default ZERO to RepaymentSchedule entity.

tasks.name: Add Liquibase migration for amountPaid column
tasks.action: Create changeset adding amount_paid DECIMAL(19,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00 to repayment_schedules. Include in master changelog.

tasks.name: Fix LoanServiceImpl payment allocation (B2)
tasks.action: Fix recordRepayment() to use amountPaid for outstanding calculation, accumulate partial payments, and mark paid only when fully paid.

commitMessage: fix(loan): add partial payment tracking to repayment schedule
